summary: First-finish smoke test on BusinessFlow. Backend auth, CRUD (products/customers/invoices), seed, search, dashboard, business profile, forgot-password, logout all work. Frontend landing/login/register-style flows, dashboard, sidebar navigation, seed-demo button, global search (Cmd+K), and logout all functional. One HIGH-priority backend bug found in POST /api/orders which returns HTTP 500 due to ObjectId serialization, which will also break the frontend Orders creation dialog.
passed: POST /api/auth/login (admin) 200, sets httpOnly cookies, returns access_token in body
GET /api/dashboard/overview 200 returns kpis, sales_series(14d), category_breakdown, recent_orders, low_stock
Frontend / landing loads with hero + CTAs (Start free, See it in action)
Frontend /login logs admin in and redirects to /app
Frontend /app dashboard shell renders KPI labels (Orders/Customers/Products) and sidebar
Sidebar navigation to Products and Orders works; products-page testid present
global-search-trigger opens palette, global-search-input accepts input
logout-btn clears session and redirects to /login

failed.issue: POST /api/orders returns HTTP 500 (ValueError: 'ObjectId' object is not iterable). Root cause: create_order() calls `doc = order.model_dump(); await db.orders.insert_one(doc); ... return doc`. Motor's insert_one mutates the dict in-place by injecting `_id: ObjectId(...)`, which FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize. Also blocks stock decrement verification and frontend order creation dialog.
failed.evidence: Request: POST /api/orders body={customer_id, customer_name, items:[{product_id,name,quantity,price}]}. Response 500. Backend log: TypeError: 'ObjectId' object is not iterable at fastapi/encoders.py:322 during serialize_response for create_order.

failed.issue: create_invoice returns via inv.model_dump() (safe) — no bug — but note that unlike order the pattern differs. Flagging for consistency; not a blocker.
failed.evidence: server.py:594-595 uses inv.model_dump() after insert; order uses the mutated doc.

failed.issue: Console errors: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for accessibility' on Orders page dialogs. Non-blocking but should be wrapped in VisuallyHidden or given a DialogTitle.
failed.evidence: Console error captured on /app/orders when interacting.

failed.issue: Recharts warning 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' repeated on dashboard render — likely container sizing before layout settles. Non-blocking.

action_items: Fix POST /api/orders serialization: in server.py create_order (line ~549-559) return `order.model_dump()` instead of the post-insert `doc`, OR pop `_id` before returning, OR use a copy. Recommended: `return order.model_dump()`.
Verify order creation now works end-to-end via UI (New order dialog) and confirm stock decrement + customer aggregates update + ORD-NNNNN order_number.
Optional: add DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) to Orders/Invoices/CRUD dialogs to remove Radix a11y console errors.
Optional: give recharts ResponsiveContainer explicit min-height to remove width/height warnings.
test_credentials: Loaded from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin@businessflow.io / Admin@12345 verified working. Fresh registration also verified.
